_comment: General-aviation aircraft you can own (endgame assets). Flying yourself skips commercial TSA but risks a DEA/FAA ramp check on arrival. ADS-B on = legally trackable; running it dark evades tracking but is a federal violation if you're caught. Prices/ranges are gameplay values.

aircraft.name: SkyRanger LSA
aircraft.blurb: A light sport puddle-jumper. Cheap wings, short legs, small hold.

aircraft.name: Cessna 172
aircraft.blurb: The workhorse single. Reliable, unremarkable, everywhere — which is the point.

aircraft.name: Piper Twin
aircraft.blurb: Two engines, real range, a hold that hides a lot. Draws more attention on the ramp.

aircraft.name: Citation (light jet)
aircraft.blurb: A light jet. Cross-country in an afternoon. Money's own aircraft — and money gets watched.
